activity.name: MatchClues

intro.title: Investigation Report
intro.text: Drag the correct clues to the glowing boxes to answer the questions. Good luck!

activity.instructions: Click-and-Drag the clues to answer the questions.
activity.question: What confirms that the fire was arson?
How do we know that the victim didn't die in the fire?
What killed our victim?
What evidence makes you suspect that Natalie was also a drug abuser?

outro.title: WELL DONE!
outro.text: Natalie Perez was brought in for questioning based on the evidence you’ve collected. She has admitted to the arson. Now it’s your chance to talk to her.
